_meta.description: Library of historical figures organized by Human Design type, Forge affinity, and primary domain for personalized recommendations
_meta.usage: Match user's HD type, dominant Forge, and interests to suggest resonant historical exemplars for Priming practice
_meta.note: HD types are based on available biographical data and chart calculations. Some attributions may be speculative for figures with unclear birth times.

generator.description: Builders and sustainers — pure life force with consistent energy when responding to life

figures.name: Albert Einstein
figures.primeGift: Transformed physics through patient, responding exploration rather than forced breakthrough
figures.keyLesson: Trust the response — his greatest insights came from following curiosity, not pushing
recommendFor: Those learning to wait for response

figures.name: The Dalai Lama
figures.primeGift: Consistent, sustained spiritual presence and teaching through decades of exile
figures.keyLesson: Generator energy in service of connection and compassion

figures.name: Oprah Winfrey
figures.primeGift: Built media empire by responding to what lit her up — authentic connection
figures.keyLesson: Follow your response to find your calling; build through sustained engagement

figures.name: Mozart
figures.primeGift: Prodigious creative output through sustained response to musical inspiration
figures.keyLesson: Generator energy can produce extraordinary volume when fully engaged

figures.name: Carl Jung
figures.primeGift: Built entire new framework through patient response to the unconscious
figures.keyLesson: Generators transform fields through sustained engagement, not sudden breakthrough

figures.name: Marie Curie
figures.primeGift: Sustained scientific inquiry for years, responding to the mystery of radioactivity
figures.keyLesson: Generator persistence in the face of obstacles and discrimination

manifestingGenerator.description: Multi-passionate builders — Generator energy with Manifestor speed, mastering through doing

figures.name: Elon Musk
figures.primeGift: Multi-passionate building across industries while maintaining intense productive energy
figures.keyLesson: MG energy can pursue multiple passions if each is a true response

figures.name: Freddie Mercury
figures.primeGift: Combined MG energy with extraordinary performance presence and passion
figures.keyLesson: MGs can master performance through their response-plus-initiation nature

figures.name: Vincent van Gogh
figures.primeGift: Transformed personal suffering into transcendent art through relentless response to vision
figures.keyLesson: MG energy can fuel massive creative output even in difficult conditions

figures.name: Beyoncé
figures.primeGift: Multi-domain excellence through responding to what lights her up
figures.keyLesson: MGs can master multiple fields without diluting power

manifestor.description: Initiators and catalysts — here to start things and impact others through their aura

figures.name: Maya Angelou
figures.primeGift: Initiated cultural conversation through powerful voice and presence
figures.keyLesson: Manifestors impact through their words and presence even when not physically initiating
recommendFor: Those finding their voice after trauma

figures.name: Ra Uru Hu
figures.primeGift: Initiated the Human Design System — pure Manifestor role of bringing new forms
figures.keyLesson: Manifestors download and initiate new systems for others to build

figures.name: Susan B. Anthony
figures.primeGift: Initiated women's suffrage movement through decades of persistent action
figures.keyLesson: Manifestors initiate but may not live to see full impact

figures.name: Adolf Hitler
figures.primeGift: SHADOW EXAMPLE — demonstrates how Manifestor energy without ethics creates destruction
figures.keyLesson: Manifestor power without morality creates horror; warns of shadow potential

figures.name: Frida Kahlo
figures.primeGift: Initiated new visual language for pain, identity, and femininity
figures.keyLesson: Manifestors create impact through unique expression no one else can replicate

projector.description: Guides and directors — here to see and guide others, waiting for recognition and invitation

figures.name: Barack Obama
figures.primeGift: Waited for recognition and invitation to extraordinary leadership position
figures.keyLesson: Projectors can reach highest levels when they wait for correct recognition

figures.name: Nelson Mandela
figures.primeGift: Guided nation through transformation, waited 27 years for correct timing
figures.keyLesson: Projector patience and waiting can have extraordinary payoff

figures.name: Princess Diana
figures.primeGift: Natural guide and connector who transformed royal role through genuine connection
figures.keyLesson: Projectors impact through presence and recognition of others' worth

figures.name: Marilyn Monroe
figures.primeGift: Extraordinary screen presence through Projector aura — others couldn't look away
figures.keyLesson: Projector visibility can be intense; self-care and boundaries essential

figures.name: Steven Spielberg
figures.primeGift: Director's role is pure Projector — seeing and guiding the vision of others
figures.keyLesson: Projectors excel when they guide without doing the Generator work

figures.name: John Lennon
figures.primeGift: Guided cultural consciousness through music and message
figures.keyLesson: Projectors can impact millions through vision and invitation to new possibility

reflector.description: Evaluators and mirrors — here to sample and reflect the health of community

figures.name: H.G. Wells
figures.primeGift: Reflected society's trajectory through science fiction — pure Reflector mirroring
figures.keyLesson: Reflectors see where we're headed by sampling where we are

figures.name: Sandra Bullock
figures.primeGift: Excellent actress because Reflectors naturally sample and mirror others
figures.keyLesson: Reflector openness makes for extraordinary empathic performance

figures.name: Michael Jackson
figures.primeGift: Reflected and amplified cultural energy through transformative performances
figures.keyLesson: Reflectors can become cultural phenomena by amplifying collective energy

chronos.description: Masters of time, patience, and enduring wisdom
exemplars: Marcus Aurelius — Stoic wisdom across time
Susan B. Anthony — Generational change patience

eros.description: Masters of passion, heart, and creative fire
exemplars: Frida Kahlo — Passionate self-expression through pain

aether.description: Masters of connection, unity, and spiritual bridge-building
exemplars: Barack Obama — Building bridges across divides

lux.description: Masters of clarity, revelation, and illumination
exemplars: Ra Uru Hu — Receiving illuminated transmission

phoenix.description: Masters of transformation, death, and rebirth
exemplars: Nelson Mandela — Personal and national transformation
Vincent van Gogh — Suffering into art
